authors: Diana Bossio Jonathon Hutchinson a RMIT University
raw_title: Taking Care Online: Reconceptualising Professional Wellbeing for Social Media Engagement in Journalism
title_en: Taking Care Online: Reconceptualising Professional Wellbeing for Social Media Engagement in Journalism
title_zh: 在线关怀：为新闻业中的社交媒体参与重新概念化职业幸福感
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨新闻工作者在使用社交媒体时如何保持职业幸福感。它建议重新思考什么是“职业幸福感”，以应对在线工作带来的新挑战。
plain_summary_en: This article explores how journalists can maintain professional wellbeing while using social media. It suggests rethinking what 'professional wellbeing' means to address new challenges from online work.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字新闻环境中职业健康的新框架，关注社交媒体对新闻工作者心理和工作实践的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating new frameworks for professional health in digital journalism, focusing on the impact of social media on journalists' psychology and work practices.
